{{nihongo|'''Komayuminono Shrine (central shrine)'''|子檀嶺神社中社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Komayuminono Shrine (central shrine)'''|子檀嶺神社中社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 子檀嶺神社中社
| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Komayuminono Shrine (central shrine)'''|子檀嶺神社中社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komayuminono Shrine (central shrine)'''|子檀嶺神社中社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komayuminono Shrine (central shrine)'''|子檀嶺神社中社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komayuminono Shrine (central shrine)'''|子檀嶺神社中社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].
